name: password-reset
description: Password reset email template for 3Play Video Platform
subject: Reset Your 3Play Password
text:
Hello {{name}},

You requested a password reset for your 3Play Video Platform account.

Click the link below to reset your password:
{{resetUrl}}

This link will expire in 30 minutes.

If you didn't request this reset, please ignore this email or contact support at {{supportEmail}} if you have concerns.

Best regards,
The 3Play Team
html:
🔒 Password Reset Request

Hello {{name}},

You requested a password reset for your 3Play Video Platform account.

Reset My Password

Or copy and paste this link into your browser:

{{resetUrl}}
⏰ This link will expire in 30 minutes.

If you didn't request this reset, please ignore this email or contact support if you have concerns.

Best regards,
The 3Play Team

Need help? Contact us at {{supportEmail}}

© {{year}} 3Play Video Platform. All rights reserved.
